entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja ,

I have 2 questions here -

1. Is the send email notification to QA reviewer is now available when developer requests exemption? I could see it was not there yet back in 2019 but thinking if it is available now.

2. Currently when the QA reviewer opens the exemption request, it is not possible to navigate to the program after going to the details of the exemption request and the corresponding finding. It would have been great if it is made possible for the reviewer to have a look at the program as well while approving/rejecting an exemption request to get a clear picture of the finding.

Thanks,
Mainak

entry.title: Re: While releasing the sales order
entry.content: Seems to be due to some custom logic.  With the standard configuration, while the sale order is released from credit lock, value will not be redetermined.  Of course, for value change, again, the sale order should go for credit block

entry.title: OSS Note 2633052 for S4Core 108 available?
entry.content:
Hello,

there is the OSS note 2633052 which is for the software components S4Core 101 and S4Core 102.

Our system has the component S4Core 108, but we would like to implement the functionality from the above mentioned note.

The requirement is to be able to preview Sales Billing document form layouts during their creation in VF01 and VF04, before they are posted.

Is there a newer note for this functionality?

Thanks and kind regards

Andrej

entry.title: How to update properties of DMS repo
entry.content:
I am working with SAP BTP DMS (Document Management Service) and the integration option

  • I want to update properties of a DMS repo, such as externalId. What API can I use to modify these properties?
  • I have created repos with a name (e.g., "Test_Repository") and the repositoryId is also set to this name. I can use this ID in other CMIS API calls, but when I try to update properties with https://{{endpoint}}/rest/v2/repositories/Test_Repository it says there is no repo with that ID. I can then get an ID by running https://{{endpoint}}/rest/v2/repositories and then checking the ID associated with this repo. I do not understand what is going on or the relationship between these 2 sets of APIs.
  • In the end, I tried to update with PUT the repos description with this API https://{{endpoint}}/rest/v2/repositories/Test_Repository and I can see it updated when I run this API but when I run the CMIS API the new description is not reflected.

entry.title: How to fetch destination using Destination Service and IAS?
entry.content:
The application I am working on uses only IAS and after switching to IAS from XSUAA the destinations can not be fetched anymore due to Destination Service which needs an XSUAA service binding. SAP Cloud SDK provides these methods:

  • getDestination
  • executeHttpRequest
  • useOrFetchDestination

The problem is that these methods tries to fetch the destination from the Destination Service, which does not work without XSUAA.

Project technologies: CAP, NodeJS, TypeScript, SAP Cloud SDK dependency, SAP BTP.

What are some possible solutions for this issue?

entry.title: Re: Upload Bank statement CAMT053 not successful!
entry.content: Hey Edrilan, thank you very much for your answer. I totally agree with you! In my case, it's a bit more special. I don't receive the account statement from a bank. The creator of the account statement is called PayJoe. This helps to create payments from payment providers such as Amazon, Paypal or Shopify. The problem is that PayJoe charges a consultation fee for every request. However, I just don't see why I have to pay a fee for something that should be available as standard. But I will make a request anyway.

entry.title: Sales order header text to billing doc. header text not copied.
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I have requirement to copy text from sales order header to billing document header. For now there is configuration in VOTXN. Problem is that it copies from SO header to billing item not sure why. I need this in header.

Furthermore in billing document i have got below log message that text could be obtained .

But it is not done automatically . There is not any text in header level copied.

 

Not sure what should be checked.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Upload Bank statement CAMT053 not successful!

entry.title: Re: Goods receipt not possible for delivery 80000391: err...
entry.content: so i have to choose confirmation as inbound delivery righ??

entry.title: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
On June 2, you’ll notice design improvements on SAP Community, as the company’s Project Glow redesign rolls out to our platform.

Project Glow extends across all SAP web properties, and you can already experience the new design’s look and feel for yourself on sites such as SAP Support Portal. SAP Community will become the latest site to benefit from Project Glow, a company-wide effort to enhance usability, comply with the latest accessibility standards, and implement a cohesive and updated look and feel to customer facing digital touchpoints. 

Elements of the redesign include the introduction of 72 font (SAP’s typeface), new iconography (and removal of pictograms), and a lighter aesthetic and softer shapes.

This mock-up should give you some idea of what to expect when the changes go into effect on June 2:

While SAP did not develop Project Glow specifically for SAP Community, the new design will address some of the common concerns that we’ve heard from you. For example, headers will become smaller across the platform, and whitespace will be reduced. In addition, the “Recommendations” widget will disappear from questions and the “Labels” widget will disappear from blog posts.

We don’t expect Project Glow to impact members on June 2, but if you are working on blog posts, long questions, or detailed answers on this date, we recommend that you save drafts periodically offline, in case you need to log in again as the redesign rolls out across community servers.

Design improvements won’t end with the introduction of Project Glow. We’ll soon add a one-column layout (to make it easier to skim new posts) and add support for dark theme. We’ll announce these changes in What’s New as soon as they are available.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Zero value journal entries during mass asset retirement via FixedAssetRet
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an unexpected behavior in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud when using the FixedAssetRetirement API to perform mass retirements of fixed assets (retirements without revenue).

When the process runs, some of the journal entries are posted with zero value, even though the related assets still have a net book value (i.e., they are not fully depreciated). This behavior seems inconsistent with accounting expectations and may result in misleading financial reporting.

Here are some additional details:

System: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (latest release)

API used: API_FIXED_ASSET_RETIREMENT_SRV

I would really appreciate your help on the following:

Is this a standard behavior of the FixedAssetRetirement API in the Public Cloud environment?

Is there any SAP Note or configuration setting that could prevent journal entries with 0 value?

Has anyone else experienced this? Any solutions or known workarounds?

Thanks a lot in advance for your support

entry.title: Re: 50000 saps how to calculate to cpu
entry.content: https://www.sap.com/about/benchmark/measuring.html

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Hi @Krishan,

This is not possible yet. Workaround could be to switch the responsible everytime, since they newly added one gets notified.

For Q3 additional UI roles are planned --> https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002513&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=9377BD7386ED1EEFB0ACD8B9312FB6D0 

In parallel we will enable new notifications on status change.

Hope this helps.

Best,

Moritz

entry.title: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maintenance ?
entry.content: Hi, Is there any hana alternative to SM30 table maintenance ?

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA SDI real-time change data capture with HanaAdapterV2 does not replicate an UPDATE row
entry.content: hanaadapter and hanadapterV2 are the same expert V2 support filter for realtime replication. They are all trigger based replication, so both the insert and update should be captured, what's your replication task/flowgraph design? what's the load behavior for target? Only update lost?

entry.title: SAP Web dispatcher error
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using permission table (via parameter "wdisp/permission_table") in the new SAP Web Dispatcher we installed and we want the case sensitivity not to be active. How can we go about this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Web dispatcher error
entry.content:
Hello,

see SAP Note 2593926 - Incompatible ICM / SAP Web Dispatcher Parameter Changes in 773 - Deprecated, Obsolete and Changed Parameters, where it says:
"Blocking or allowing specific URLs can be configured using parameter icm/HTTP/auth."  and "Additionally, block- and/or allowlists in icm/HTTP/auth are by default handled case-insensitively"

See also SAP Note 908097 - SAP Web Dispatcher: Release, Installation, Patches, Documentation, for SAP Web dispatcher release recommendation

kind regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: 🇬🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

entry.title: Re: Unable to ceate new user in the SAP HANA database explorer

entry.title: Enable Now Manager LDAPS - Unsupported signature algorithm (after licensing)
entry.content:
Hello,

we are using Enable Now Manager onPremise and use LDAPS for User authentication.

It has been working fine until we added the license (before it wasn´t licensed).

Now we always get the error: ldapserver:636 [Root exception is javax.net.ssl.SSLException: Unsupported signature algorithm (rsa_pss_rsae_sha256) used in CertificateVerify handshake message]

After I restart the tomcat, I can login with a LDAP user, but only once. Then the same error occurs.

There is no problem logging in with a local user, only problems with ldap, only when the license is activated.
I deleted the license again from the database, so that we can login.

What happens when I activate the license, that might change TLS or LDAP settings or similar?

Manager Version: 10.8.5
Tomcat: 9.0.105
Java:  JRE 21
Windows Server 2019

Thanks in advance! Much appreciated!

Alec

entry.title: Re: Vendor Batch table in EWM
entry.content: The Vendor Batch is stored in table AUSP. Filter the OBJEK field with the material key and batch combined as string. Use the field ATINN further to filter only Vendor Batch with constant value "LOBM_LICHA".

READ ENTITIES OF zr_### IN LOCAL MODE

entry.content:
Facing similar issue that I found in one community question without answer.
For my new Custom field which I plan to use on sales order item level, C_SALESORDERMANAGE_SD (OData Service), SalesOrderItemType (OData Entity), C_SALESORDERITEMMANAGE (CDS View) and SAP GUI SD_SALESDOCITEM_GUI were enabled but I only see my new field in Manage sales order app but not in the Manage sales order - Version 2 app.

In addition to above point where am I supposed to see Custom tab fields in the new app? Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Parameter MASTER_IDOC_CONTROL versus COMMUNICATION_IDOC_CONTROL? (MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE)
entry.content:
I understand the parameter MASTER_IDOC_DATA of the function module MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE, which is to contain the segments of all Outbound IDOCs to be created, but what's the difference between MASTER_IDOC_CONTROL (structure of type EDIDC) and COMMUNICATION_IDOC_CONTROL (table with lines of type EDIDC)?

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Parameter MASTER_IDOC_CONTROL versus COMMUNICATION_ID...
entry.content:
The online documentation of MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE doesn't explain, but it's very simple:

  • MASTER_IDOC_CONTROL is an input parameter used as template to create the Control records of all IDOC to be created (those defined in MASTER_IDOC_DATA)
    • For information, you may not fill SNDPRT and SNDPRN: if they are empty, LS <current logical system> is used. The current logical system is the one defined in SCC4 for the current client. Also, if SERIAL is empty, one is generated as being <current date> <current time> (e.g. 20250526140659). If IDOC long names are NOT used (MESTYP, IDOCTP), the short names are used (STDMES, DOCTYP).
  • COMMUNICATION_IDOC_CONTROL is an output parameter to return the list of created IDOC and their numbers (DOCNUM).

For information, the parameter MASTER_IDOC_DATA may contain segments of several IDOC, you may differentiate segments of each IDOC by assigning a different temporary IDOC number (DOCNUM) like 1 for the first IDOC, 2 for the second IDOC and so on. COMMUNICATION_IDOC_CONTROL will return the true IDOC numbers assigned.

I am trying t upload an icon on object page header in RAP application.
I am providing values form SAP-icons for example sap-icon://accelerated. it is populating the error "Annotation value must not contain the // character" . Could you please help me to understand how to pass correct value to image URL

entry.title: Інноваційні новини на SAP Sapphire
entry.content:
SAP оголосила революційні AI-інновації на конференції Sapphire 2025🔥

На щорічній конференції SAP Sapphire компанія представила лінійку нововведень, які кардинально змінюють підхід до впровадження штучного інтелекту в бізнесі. Ключові оголошення охоплюють нові партнерства, розширення можливостей AI-асистента Joule та вдосконалення SAP Business Technology Platform.

AI Co-Innovation Program: партнерство SAP та AWS

SAP SE та AWS запустили нову програму AI Co-Innovation Program для створення генеративних ШІ-додатків, що вирішують бізнес-завдання у реальному часі. Програма об'єднує корпоративні технології SAP з генеративними послугами ШІ від AWS, включаючи Amazon Bedrock та великі мовні моделі Amazon Nova і Anthropic Claude.

Перші партнери програми — Accenture та Deloitte — вже працюють над практичними рішеннями: створенням стійкості активів до стихійних лих та фінансовими рішеннями для сфери охорони здоров'я.

Нові партнерства з Perplexity та Palantir

Партнерство з Perplexity розширює можливості AI-асистента Joule, дозволяючи йому використовувати структуровані та неструктуровані дані для миттєвих відповідей у форматі діаграм та графіків на основі реальних бізнес-даних.

Партнерство з Palantir підтримує хмарну трансформацію клієнтів з високими вимогами до безпеки, включно з урядовими структурами США, створюючи уніфіковану дата-архітектуру через інтеграцію з SAP Business Data Cloud.

Еволюція Joule: від асистента до екосистеми агентів

Joule значно розширив свої можливості — тепер він доступний практично всюди, включає проактивну панель дій на базі WalkMe та керує мережею інтелектуальних агентів, які працюють автономно у різних бізнес-напрямках.

Нововведення SAP Business Technology Platform

Joule Studio — нова функція в SAP Build для створення власних агентів ШІ та навичок Joule з використанням low-code та no-code підходів. Офіційний реліз заплановано на червень 2025 року.

AI Foundation — операційна система для Business AI, що служить єдиною точкою входу для створення та запуску AI-рішень у великих масштабах. Новий оптимізатор підказок скорочує час роботи з днів до хвилин.

Оновлений SAP Integration Suite з новими AI-можливостями для інтеграції локальних та хмарних процесів, включаючи прогнози API-трафіку та адаптер для підключення власних мовних моделей.

Розширена інтеграція з SAP Business Data Cloud — з другої половини 2025 року розробники зможуть використовувати SAP Build для прямого доступу до продуктів даних.

Практичне значення для бізнесу

Ці інновації роблять штучний інтелект доступним для середніх та великих підприємств, дозволяючи створювати власних AI-агентів без глибоких технічних знань, інтегрувати ШІ в існуючі процеси та отримувати до 35% швидшу окупність інвестицій завдяки новим рішенням для міграції в хмару.

Готові стати частиною революції Business AI? Ознайомтеся з повним Посібником з інновацій SAP Sapphire 2025 та поділіться своїми думками: які з цих інновацій найбільше вплинуть на вашу галузь?

Для отримання додаткової інформації про AWS SAP AI Co-Innovation Program відвідайте aws.amazon.com/sap/ai 

А про всі новини SAP читайте тут.🚀

entry.title: Final settlement is not considering the previous settlement amount in Multi Payee Condition contract
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one issue in CCM- Condition contracts Management.

In Multi Payee Scenario, System is not adjusting the amount in the final settlement considering the partial settlement amount which was already settled but creating final settlement document with exact amount like in partial settlement document and not determining RES2 condition type.
Final settlement is considering previous settlement amount only when the Bill to party number is same as Sold to Party and determining RES2 in final settlement document.

Request you to share the inputs.

#Settlement Management   SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales   SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: What is item cost and by which document addition will...
entry.content:
Hi,

What Is Item Cost in SAP B1?
The Item Cost is: The value of the item per unit in the warehouse. Calculated and updated based on inventory transactions.

Dependent on the valuation method used:
Moving Average
Standard Cost
FIFO (First In, First Out)
Serial/Batch (SAP B1 Version 10 & above).

Document TypeAffects Item Cost?Notes
Goods Receipt PO (GRPO)✅ YesIncreases stock; adds cost based on PO price.
AP Invoice (linked to GRPO)❌ NoDoesn’t affect cost (for moving average/FIFO); only financial.
Goods Issue✅ YesDecreases stock; cost is removed from inventory.
Inventory Transfer🔁 MaybeOnly if moving between warehouses with different costs (FIFO tracked by warehouse).
Inventory Adjustment✅ YesAdjusts stock up/down; impacts cost based on price entered.
Production Order – Receipt from Production✅ YesAdds finished product to stock with cost based on components.
Production Order – Issue for Production✅ YesRemoves raw materials; affects component cost.
Returns (Purchase Return, AR Return)✅ YesDecreases inventory; returns at the original cost basis.
Landed Cost Document✅ YesIncreases item cost retroactively by distributing additional costs (freight, customs, etc.).
Opening Balance (Initial Quantities)✅ YesEstablishes the starting cost for items.

entry.title: Re: Problem with Negative Posting + no entries in BSET for negative posting
entry.content: Hello All,

entry.title: Re: When to create my own badi?
entry.content: No idea why all your New BAdI implementations exist but are empty. If a client needs implementing a New BAdI defined by SAP, there's no other choice than creating an implementation for it.

entry.title: Re: "How to offset a credit note during the SEPA SDD ITAL...
entry.content: HI Vijaykumar, thank you, but my customer want netting off an invoice with a credit memo WIHTOUT Invoice reference number.

entry.title: Re: Can Output Management be used for custom forms?
entry.content:
Hi,

Custom form must be assigned to a standard Output type like 'BILLING_DOCUMENT' or 'PURCHASE_ORDER' or other type in the System as applicable to the use case, in SSCUI 'Assign Form Templates'. After this step, the custom form can be triggered and printed. But if you want to use an API in this context, please find the details in this SAP Blog: Connecting external Output Management System to SAP Print Queue in SAP Cloud Solutions.

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: ‌🇧🇷‌ 3rd ASUG BR Meeting - SIG Localization
entry.content:
Join us for the 3rd ASUG BR Meeting - SIG Localization, a virtual event bringing together SAP experts and professionals focused on Brazilian localization topics.

Agenda Highlights:

  • Tax Reform: Delve into the latest changes and prepare your systems for compliance.
  • DRC NF-e Planning: Learn strategies for effective planning and execution.
  • Updates Technical Notes: Stay informed about the newest technical insights and updates.
  • And More: Engage in discussions on other pertinent topics.

Speakers:

Ahymoto, Cintia, SAP Brazil
Miele, Andrea, SAP Brazil
Wada, Claudia, SAP Brazil
Izilda, Maria, SAP Brazil
Kyono, Eduardo, SAP Brazil

This event is targeted at members of ASUG BR. The webinar will be conducted in Portuguese.

Register now and receive the session link!

entry.title: Re: Free SAP Certification and practice systems for students & lecturers
entry.content: @David_Chaviano I have student subscription. However, when I try to access Hands-on-Practice it shows as "Temporarily unavailable". I wanted to confirm whether Hands-on-Practice is included as a part of student subscription or not?

entry.title: Maintenance notifications app short dump
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

A new error came up when we tried to use the Find Maintenance Notifications app (F2071).
The error is:

I have already tried to search up for an sap note but I was not succeded.
Can any of you help me?

Thank you! 🙂

entry.title: Inquiry on Allocation of Incidental Costs for Imported Raw Materials
entry.content:
We would like to allocate incidental costs such as customs clearance fees, unloading charges, warehousing fees, etc., which occur during the purchase of imported raw materials, to the respective purchased raw materials.

Could you please provide guidance on

1. Which CBC (Central Business Configuration) scope items need to be selected and configured, and

2. In which applications (apps) this process is executed?

entry.title: Greyed out buttons/activities in the Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

In the Fiori app Migration Cockpit, I just created a new staging tables Migration Project to upload master data to the system. I'm facing an issue though: all action buttons are greyed out in it (Prepare, Simulate, Migrate and so on). My question then is:

  • How do I make these buttons/options/activities available so I can start the data migration in the app?

I'm using an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Data migration experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Greyed out buttons/activities in the Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Before any further activities can be started, the staging tables of the Migration Object which you want to work with must be filled with the corresponding data you want to upload. You can do so by using the Migration Object's template files or your preferred tools.

All this is stated in the app's official documentation, which I'm linking below:

  • The Migration Process | SAP Help Portal

After the respective data is transferred into the staging tables, the remaining activities (such as Prepare, Simulate and Migrate) will then be available for usage.

I hope this helps with your query!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Calculate Date difference excluding weekends in SAC using data actions?
entry.content:
Hello,

In the planning scenario, the fiscal period ranges from Apr to Mar. I wanted to calculate no of days between the start date and user defined date excluding the weekends in SAC. The result of this calculation will be further used in other calculation and that is the reason I want to use data action to store these values.

For ex: Start Date: 01 Apr 2025 , User Defined Date: 26 May 2025. The result should be 40 days excluding Saturdays and Sundays between these time ranges.

My question to this community is whether this is possible in SAC? If it is possible, those who have faced this similar issue and knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Can anyone link me to Hana DB SQL queries documentation or guide?
entry.content: What I have noticed is that mysql server and HANA DB SQL syntax differs a bit .So I am confused how to QUERY using HANA DB specifically for FMS and Approval based query.Also need clarification on "DUMMY" placeholder table.Like when it is being used

entry.title: Re: French Viewer issue with SP37
entry.content: Hello Don, No it's not a subreport, my code has not change between SP15 and SP37. I only update the SP. If i run the report with an English viewer i don't have the issue. I'm able to replicate the issue with a Blank Report. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Note-Oriented Discovery of Maintenance Planner for SAP Security Notes
entry.content:
Guten Tag, Herr Görlich!
Das Bild mit "Entdecken Sie SAP-Hinweise", welches Sie als erstes in diesem Blog eingefügt haben,
will sich bei mir im Maintenance Planner ( https://maintenanceplanner.cloud.sap/#/noteOrientedDiscovery ) NICHT zeigen:
Da sehe ich am Einstiegsbild zwar eine Kachel "View Recommended Notes" - aber das ist ja eine andere Baustelle als "Entdecken Sie SAP-Hinweise"?
Die zur Anzeige von "Entdecken Sie SAP-Hinweise" notwendigen Rollen "Display System Data" und "Security Contact" wurden meinem S-User zugeteilt.
Haben Sie dazu vielleicht einen Tipp für mich?

Danke im Voraus und Liebe Grüße,
Peter KOSAR.

entry.title: Re: What is item cost and by which document addition will...
entry.content: Will it be possible for PO document and GRPO document to have different prices.I am confused which cost will be taken during item cost calculations (based on moving average).Please clarify

entry.title: Innovation & Sustainability in Utilities: May Newsletter Highlights You Need to Know
entry.content:
Dear Utiliites Community,

Welcome to the latest update from the SAP Utilities Community! We’re in the midst of an exciting season of innovation, collaboration, and transformation all of which you can read about in our May newsletter edition. 

Following the successful SAP Sapphire event in Orlando, we’re looking forward to continuing the momentum in Madrid from May 26–28. These events offer a unique opportunity to explore what’s next for utilities, from digital transformation to sustainable energy solutions. Read what's in for utilities. 

Looking ahead, we invite you to connect with us at the Future of Utilities Summit in London (June 11–12). where we are happy to welcome you at our. Join our virtual Espresso Session on June 3, where we’ll dive into the SAP Utilities Roadmap and Customer Co-Innovation.

Last month, we gathered in Rotterdam for the SAP Conference for Energy and Utilities, hosted by TAC Insights. Attendees experienced innovations like SAP Business AI, Distributed Energy Resources, and the SAP Business Data Cloud—all brought to life at our immersive SAP Pop-Up Campus.

We’re also proud to spotlight customer success stories from around the world:

  • Energy Queensland and SA Power Networks are leveraging AI to accelerate Australia’s energy transition.
  • Andel in Denmark has migrated to the cloud, streamlining operations with SAP solutions.
  • Farys in Belgium is building a smart water platform using SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP to reduce waste and promote sustainability.

A heartfelt thank you to all participants in the SAP Innovation Awards 2025. Your visionary projects are shaping a smarter, more sustainable future for utilities everywhere. See who participated from the energy sector. 

Stay connected, stay inspired—and let’s continue building the future of utilities together. Sign up here for future newsletter editions. 

Read the full May Newsletter - available to read online.

entry.title: Re: I have a query in the SAP SAC, does it support Table format data as similar to a Webi template
entry.content:
Hello @ujjani,

Yes, you can show the details in a single table in SAC. Just create Country, State as dimensions and cost, unitprice and quantity as measures in SAC model. After uploading the data into this SAC model, create a new story and select the table widget and call the dimension and measure in the story to view the data in single table.

entry.title: Re: Creating the Shell System for SAP Business Transformation Center: A Practical Approach
entry.content:
Thanks @Necronomicon.

No, I opted for the system copy approach because I still require access to the source system in SAP Business Transformation Center afterwards. Besides that, I wanted to describe a method that works for both homogeneous and heterogeneous scenarios. As the systems must be identical for the client copy and an update is not required, I decided to use the system copy approach for that purpose.

entry.title: Issue with Finding Entities in SAP Standard API for Equipment MarkForDeletion Functionality
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently working on utilizing the SAP Standard API for equipment management, specifically to implement the "MarkForDeletion" functionality. I referred to the API details on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, where I found the following endpoints related to equipment deletion:

  • POST /ResetEQUIPFromInactive
  • POST /SetEQUIPToInactive
  • POST /SetEQUIPToMarkedForDeletion

I have attached a snapshot from the Business Accelerator Hub showing these endpoints for reference (Snapshot 1).

However, when I checked the available entity sets in the SAP Gateway Client using transaction code /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE for the service /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_EQUIPMENT/, I could not find the corresponding entities or operations for the above endpoints. The entity sets I found are limited to:

  • EQUIPClassCharacteristicValue
  • EQUIPMENT
  • EQUIPMENTClass
  • EQUIPMENTClassCharacteristic
  • EQUIPMENTLONGTEXT
  • EQUIPMENTPARTNER
  • EQUIPMENTWARRANTY

I have attached a snapshot from the SAP Gateway Client showing the available entity sets (Snapshot 2).

My questions are:

  1. Where can I find the detailed implementation or metadata for the SetEQUIPToMarkedForDeletion functionality in the SAP system?
  2. Are these endpoints (ResetEQUIPFromInactive, SetEQUIPToInactive, SetEQUIPToMarkedForDeletion) part of a different service or require additional configuration to be visible in the Gateway Client?
  3. How can I proceed with using the "MarkForDeletion" functionality for equipment via the API?

We are keen on using this functionality for our project, so any guidance on how to locate or enable these operations would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your insights!

Attachments:

  • Snapshot 1: Business Accelerator Hub API Endpoints
  • Snapshot 2: SAP Gateway Client Entity Sets

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: New Custom field not shown in Manage Sales order - Ve...
entry.content:
Hello,

From your description, it appears that you have correctly enabled your custom field for the relevant business contexts, including C_SALESORDERMANAGE_SD OData service, SalesOrderItemType OData Entity, C_SALESORDERITEMMANAGE CDS View, and SAP GUI SD_SALESDOCITEM_GUI. If the custom field appears in the Manage Sales Orders app but not in the Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 app, follow these steps to ensure visibility:

Steps to Ensure Visibility in “Manage Sales Orders - Version 2”

  1. Confirm Field Enabling in UI Elements:

    • Check whether the custom field is also enabled for the UI elements specific to the Manage Sales Orders - Version 2app. This typically includes:
      • Sales order header: general information
      • Item details: general information, delivery, prices, and status

  2. Review Custom Fields App Settings:

    • Use the Custom Fields app to verify that the field is enabled under UIs and Reports for the required business contexts.

  3. User Interface Tab:

    • Ensure that on the User Interfaces tab, the relevant settings for this specific version of the app are enabled. It’s possible that additional configuration under ‘Manage Sales Orders - Version 2’ might be required.

  4. Check SAP Fiori Launchpad Configuration:

    • Make sure that your SAP Fiori Launchpad configuration includes the necessary roles and permissions for viewing the custom field across different applications.

Custom Tab Fields Visibility

In the Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 app, Sales - App Extensibility: Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 (Key User) custom fields should appear under the following UI elements:

  • Item details related to general information, delivery (basic data), and prices.
  • Specific sections such as Status and Blocks.

You can manage these fields through key user adaptation, ensuring they are correctly integrated into both standard and custom field groups relevant to the app structure.

Additionally, ensure that you have followed suitable steps to publish changes and assign the necessary version updates across the UI elements intended for viewing these custom fields.

Best regards, Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Neue Schulung: F0100 Overview of Financials in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Ich interessiere mich für den Einsteigerkurs F0100 für einen neuen Kollegen in einem classroom Training in Walldorf in deutscher Sprache. Leider gibt es lt. Trainingskatalog nur im Juni 2025 einen Kurs. Gibt es danach nochmal einen?

entry.title: Re: It doesn't allow to assign the responsible person in...
entry.content:
Hi Oscar,

First you must set up business users in SAP S/4HANA, see the link here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/d059e64138b04f108078dc0d5891bd95.html as well as SAP Note 2570961: https://me.sap.com/notes/2570961

It is a reccomended step (but optional) to use Teams functionality. If the work center isn't linked to a team, or if your search doesn't yield any results, clear the work center filter to extend the search to all people in your organization.

To learn how to set up Teams for Work Centers, see the help documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/14c9d7443dd14d7186d019065c410eed.html and additionally the procedure: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/44e03e5a6c164d33b91f389ba80055ba.html

Kind regards,
Ryan

entry.title: Re: About purchasing and production
entry.content:
Hello,

if you use MRP there need to be a demand in a plant. In this plant the purchase req. will be created and by default the delivery address will be the address of the plant or of the storage location.

Your scenario will only work if you processing destination is part of the plant from company A. It can be a different delivery address based on the storage location.

If this will not help you, please provide some more details on the processing destination (plant and company).

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Need explanation on the MENGE value in the OSS note 3382819
entry.content:
hi,

In the OSS note 3382819 - MR11/MR11SHOW - Calculation logic for GR/IR clearing, the calculation details for the MR11 cancellation amount are explained.

But in the formula, a variable MENGE is used but this one is not explained. Can someone help me to understand the calculation ?

Thanks in advance for your feedback,

Regards, 
Céline JOMARD
SAP FI specialist

entry.title: Re: Scheduling background job through ABAP program which...
entry.content:
If I understand correctly, you want a 3-step job. Looking at the function module documentation I would expect the following combination of function modules to work:

JOB_OPEN,JOB_SUBMIT,JOB_SUBMIT,JOB_SUBMIT,JOB_CLOSE

entry.title: Re: filed" scrap "in routing masterdata（PP）
entry.content:
Hello,

you can update the data with the app "Change Routing" in the Operation Details.

I you are looking for a mass transaction, you can update it using the avaiable API: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/812e8a99732c4c3596feff5cacd5148e.html?locale=en-US

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

do you know what is odata?

why you have to find the entity?

entry.title: Incorrect number generated despite a business rule
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a custom MDF object, with a custom field to update a number. Rule is in place to update this number as 'P+user id', while saving the object for the first time. It is generally working; but randomly for one EE it generated a wrong number 'P123456'. 

Rule trace is coming blank for all test users for some reason; so can't check from that. Any pointers?

Thanks & regards,

Mithila Pethe

entry.title: I want to use T table example T095 in rap
entry.content:
if_rap_query_provider~select

SELECT * FROM T095 into table @DATA(lt_t095).

Hello expert, I would like to use the T table, but it indicates that it is not allowed. Is there any other alternative method

entry.title: Re: Can Output Management be used for custom forms?
entry.content: Thanks for the reply! This confirms my suspicion that I can not use the default Output Management app for any custom output. As you suggest, that would require an external OMS. Possible, but hardly the best option for just introducing 'reprint' functionality. So the solution will then be a custom table, save minimal data, create CDS views with annotations and introduce a custom function/button in the Behavior Definition. Should work 🙂

entry.title: Extract LSMW object level list
entry.content:
This blog is to share some experience about how to extract LSMW project and object level list. This question is triggered by one of my SD consultant friends that his client asks him to get the LSMW current existed list.

As we know LSMW is a t-code, in LSMW there is 3 level:

1) project

2) subproject

3) object

In front-end LSMW screen, when we click 'all objects', we can see all the object created.

The requirement is how can we get and download the list? So we should go through the last level - object level to get the list.

As we know, all related data of LSMW is stored in /SAPDMC/LS* tables.

Go to SE16N, we search the related table, and find one similar table /SAPDMC/LSOTXT, this is what we need.

entry.title: Re: Need explanation on the MENGE value in the OSS note 3...
entry.content:
Hello @CélineJOMARD 

As far as I can see, it is the quantity field from the purchase history table, EKBE-MENGE - see the note 1674290 - Invoice Posting Logic - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA, that is referred by 3382819 - MR11/MR11SHOW - Calculation logic for GR/IR clearing.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Transportation Order Items custom f...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please create custom field under Business Context 'Transportation Order: Items' and publish it.  It will then be visible in 'Manage Freight Orders' App under: Manage Freight Orders -> Select a Freight Order -> Items -> Select an Item -> Custom Fields. Please find more details here: SAP Help Portal - App Extensibility: Freight Order Management (Key User). 

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Re: What is item cost and by which document addition will...
entry.content: Yes, it is possible for the PO (Purchase Order) and GRPO (Goods Receipt PO) documents to have different prices in SAP Business One. The system allows you to change the unit price at the time of GRPO, even if it's different from what was originally entered in the PO. Regarding the item cost calculation using Moving Average, SAP Business One will use the price from the GRPO document for updating the item cost — not the PO price. This is because the GRPO is the actual transaction that affects inventory levels and valuation. So, the moving average cost will be recalculated based on the GRPO price and quantity at the time the items are received into stock.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Finding Entities in SAP Standard API for E...
entry.content: We wanted to Markfor deletion functionality for an equipment as searched in SAP Business Accelerator Hub, shows above end points(Which are mention in the body of the post) used for the delete functionalities

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI 8 patch 12 gives an error "the path for the t...
entry.content:
This is a clear case of a failed installation. 

Perform a clean installation of the SAP gui as it seems some registry keys still exist from the older previous installation. 

Run nwsapsetup /uninstall /all /nodlg from the "run" menu, and restart and reinstall again. 

This should solve your issue,

entry.title: Re: Issue with Finding Entities in SAP Standard API for E...
entry.content: Thanks for the responce and please let us know if any other API that is used for Deletion of an equipment.

entry.title: Re: I'm not able to access Process Manager from SAP Signa...
entry.content:
Hi @MikeK2 
As per information from the SAP Signavio Training team the access should be available when clicking on the dots (top right side). There the person should be able to choose „Process Manager“.

Please let us know in case that this is not possible.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Data Action - Place Dimension = # on the valid combination from booked data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a uploaded data via a csv file on FUNC_AREA = "#" and PLANT = "#" on an upload version. The rest of the dimensions is placed on the correct members.

I need to transfer these numbers to an budget version, however it should post on the valid combination of the booked values of the uploaded values on dimensions on "#"

I have already transfered last years booked values ( thus on the correct combinations of dimension members).

CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/FUNC_AREA],[d/COST_CENTER],[d/PROFIT],[d/Plant],[d/GL_ACCOUNT]
// Scope
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/From_Date] TO [d/Version].[p/To_Date]
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("Amount_LC")

// Copy
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %SourceVersion%) > 0 then 
	FOREACH.BOOKED [d/FUNC_AREA], [d/Plant]
		DATA () = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]= %SourceVersion%, [d/FUNC_AREA] = "#", [d/Plant] = "#")
	ENDFOR
ENDIF

It works with if I use the FOREACH statement without the IF statement, however the performance is too bad, as there are many members.

I tried with the IF statement to only loop over the uploaded members of ([d/FUNC_AREA],[d/COST_CENTER],[d/PROFIT],[d/Plant],[d/GL_ACCOUNT]) but 0 values is returned.

 

Anyone has any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Need explanation on the MENGE value in the OSS note 3...
entry.content:
Hi Dominik,

Thank you for your quick answer but it is not so obvious. The field MENGE is used to calculate the value of the variables

  • WEMNGO = total quantity of goods delivered at the time of the MR11
  • REMNGO = total quantity of goods invoiced at the time of the MR11
  • WEMNG = total quantity of goods delivered before MR11SHOW
  • REMNG = total quantity of goods invoiced before MR11SHOW

But i don't see to what other quantity this can refer to. In one of the formula, it is given :

"Only a part of the exceeded GR quantity is invoiced, which means less quantity invoiced compared to received, REMNG + MENGE < WEMNG ", But I don't understand what it can refers to.

Regards,
Céline JOMARD
SAP FI specialist

here an integration scheme: 

And about SoD, here some examples:

entry.title: Re: sap s4hana cloud - creating journal entry with Busine...
entry.content: Hi Vikjaykunmar, i have reposted my questions with some screenshots.

entry.title: Down Payment Settlement Line Items Repeating in Final Billing
entry.content:
In the final billing (SD Billing), after the down payment is received and cleared and the delivery is completed, the system generates down payment settlement lines for each sales order line item.

For example: For a sales order with 100 line items, 100 corresponding down payment settlement lines are generated in the billing document. This causes clutter in the invoice output and affects readability.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Down Payment Settlement Line Items Repeating in Final...
entry.content:
If you do not want to print the items, you need to create a custom form template and filter out settlement items.

Please refer the following documentation for guidance:

  • How to Create and Use Custom Form Templates - SAP Help Portal
  • 2941522 - Output Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Guided Answer

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Custom Fields Copied Over When Adopt Purchase Requisition to Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi all,

Please Help Me, I have an Issue in Purchase Order

1. I created PO with reference to Purchase Requisition no 1 and fill the custom field, PO created with line item 10, save.

2. Delete line 10, save

3. Change the purchase order, adopt again purchase requisition no 1, and PO will be created with line 20. But if you see the Custom Field is fill with data from line 10

Please help me, why the custom field copied over to line 20?

Thanks and Best Regards

Yunike Andriani
